title: A1 — First PA: vocal + guitar amp
brief: Wire a small live rig: two dynamic mics into the Dante stagebox on stage, the stagebox to the QL1 at front of house, the main mix to the PA top and a monitor mix to the singer's wedge.
objective: Singer heard in the PA, guitar amp miked, singer hears herself in the wedge.
successMessage: Soundcheck passed — the vocal is in the PA, the amp is miked, and the wedge is live. Welcome to FOH.
notes: No condenser in this level, so R4 is not active. Power connections exist on devices for exploration but are not part of the required chain in v1.
